metadata.name: Redeem Loyalty Points for a Free Night

description: A loyalty member calls to book a room using their points.

nodes.task_description: Identify the guest and look up their loyalty account and points balance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the guest has enough points for a free night.

nodes.task_description: Check for award night availability for the guest's desired dates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms that award nights are available.

nodes.task_description: Book the reservation using the guest's points and deduct the points from their account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully books the award stay and updates the guest's points balance.
